author: doll-agent
content: Bundling #725-#729 into one ferray-polynomial/src/f32_wrappers.rs module via an impl_f32_wrapper! macro. Each wrapper holds the f64 type and converts on the public boundary. Lightweight surface (eval/deriv/integ/add/sub/mul/to_f64/from_f64); full surface accessible via .as_f64() escape hatch.
